# Joshua Opolko
> Builder of AI systems and Toronto data tools, plus writing on AI/GEO, psychology, and VR.

## Toronto data tools (daily-updated, free)
- [Toronto Kids Events](https://joshuaopolko.com/kidsevents/): Free and low-cost kids and family events across Toronto, aggregated daily from EarlyON drop-in centres, Toronto Public Library, City Parks & Recreation, museums, and community groups. Browse by date, age group, category, and neighbourhood.

## Toronto Kids Events guides (editorial, live data refreshed daily)
- [Free Museum Days in Toronto for Kids](https://joshuaopolko.com/kidsevents/free-museum-days/): Every recurring free window — ROM third Tuesdays, AGO first Wednesdays, Canada Strong Pass summer, always-free Toronto History Museums.
- [Kids Events by Neighbourhood](https://joshuaopolko.com/kidsevents/neighbourhoods/): How free programming distributes across Toronto's districts, with live counts.
- [Data Sources & Methodology](https://joshuaopolko.com/kidsevents/methodology/): Where the event data comes from, daily rebuild process, accuracy policy, and privacy.
- [HomeTurf — Toronto Neighbourhood Guide](https://joshuaopolko.com/hometurf/): Compare all 158 Toronto neighbourhoods by share of children, median household income, schools, licensed childcare, demographics, transit use, and growth.
- [NowServingTO](https://nowservingto.com): Daily-fresh directory of Toronto's newest restaurants by cuisine.

## AI & GEO
- [The GEO Field Manual](https://joshuaopolko.com/geo-field-manual/): Ten technical steps to get cited by ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini, with the data behind each, copy-paste prompts, and a master prompt you can hand any AI.
- [AEO, Answered](https://joshuaopolko.com/geo-answers/): First-party answers to the questions people actually ask about getting cited by AI: whether AEO produces real results, why some sites get cited consistently and others don't, and what an AI-visibility tool should do.
- [GEO: 0 to 1,800 AI Citations in 120 Days](https://joshuaopolko.com/claude-seo/): Optimizing for AI citation instead of clicks.
- [Your Site as AI Infrastructure](https://joshuaopolko.com/ai-infrastructure/): Becoming a trusted source for ChatGPT and Claude.
- [The LLM-as-ETL Architecture](https://joshuaopolko.com/llm-etl-architecture/): Building a data pipeline around Claude.

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/jopolko
